label: Nonprofit workforce volunteer share
quote: one-third of the nonprofit workforce is comprised of volunteers
reason: Clear percentage statistic about volunteer composition of nonprofit workforce.

label: National volunteer participation rate
quote: national participation remains stagnant, hovering between 20 and 30 percent, with current rates at just 28 percent
reason: Explicit statistic on national volunteer participation rate.

label: Critical volunteer role unfilled rate
quote: about half of critical volunteer roles going unfilled each year
reason: Statistic on unfilled volunteer roles, though 'about half' is approximate.

label: Nonprofit workforce volunteer share (repeated)
quote: nearly one-third of the nonprofit workforce is made up of volunteers
reason: Reiteration of statistic reinforcing volunteer share.

label: Youth mental health crisis statistic
quote: Youth mental health is in crisis. In the decade before 2019, disorders and suicidal behaviors among high school students rose by more than 40%
reason: Statistic on rise in youth mental health issues.

label: Mentorship waitlist statistic
quote: approximately 22% of young people who are seeking mentorship are on a waitlist for a mentor
reason: Statistic on unmet need for mentors.

label: Critical volunteer openings unfilled
quote: approximately 50% of critical volunteer openings remain unfilled each year
reason: Statistic on unfilled volunteer openings from Points of Light data.

label: Foundation giving to volunteer engagement
quote: the 10 largest independent and operating foundations allocated an even smaller portion – just 0.07% of their portfolios
reason: Exact percentage from data on foundation giving.

label: Total philanthropic giving to volunteer engagement
quote: 0.19% (or $1.7 of $915.7 billion) of these funders’ total giving was directed specifically to volunteer engagement
reason: Specific statistic on funding allocation to volunteer engagement.

label: Funder agreement on volunteer impact
quote: only 25% of funders reported sharing this view
reason: Statistic on funder perception of volunteer impact.

label: Corporate giving to volunteer engagement
quote: 0.54% of their giving directly to volunteer engagement
reason: Statistic on corporate funding for volunteer engagement.

label: Cost per volunteer range
quote: estimates ranged from $136 to $2,000 per volunteer
reason: Cost range for volunteer recruitment and deployment.
